title: AI Model Catalog index
description: The discovery entry point. Consumers fetch this first, then the provider files it lists. Consumers must ignore fields they do not recognize.

generatedAt.description: UTC ISO 8601 timestamp of the build that produced this index. Consumers can compare it to their last sync and skip downloads when unchanged.

totalModels.description: Sum of modelCount across all providers (added in 1.1.0).

totalFreeModels.description: Count of models with costClass=free across all providers (added in 1.1.0).

freeModelCount.description: Models with costClass=free in this provider file (added in 1.1.0).
